layout_description: Card-based grid layout. Each card features a circular headshot image with an expandable 'learn more' button, the member's name, job title, and a brief personal bio snippet.

team_members.name: Carina Lopez
team_members.title: Hair Designer
team_members.bio_snippet: You can often find me at the gym, spending time with my family, or enjoying the beach.

team_members.name: Makayla Davila
team_members.title: Hair Designer
team_members.bio_snippet: When I'm not behind the chair, you'll usually find me staying active—whether it's playing pickleball.

team_members.name: Hope Sanchez
team_members.title: Hair Designer
team_members.bio_snippet: You can find me lost in a good book or binge-watching my favorite shows. All while sipping coffee.

team_members.name: Amber Kehoe
team_members.title: Hair Designer
team_members.bio_snippet: Outside of the salon, I'm a proud mom and I love staying active with workouts.

team_members.name: Cat Barco
team_members.title: Owner & Hair Designer
team_members.bio_snippet: You can usually find me sipping a creamy protein coffee or green tea lemonade with matcha.
